summary: Possible typosquat of 'thirdweb' — name similarity without traced payload
details: Package name 'thirdwebb' differs from the established 'thirdweb' SDK by a single trailing character, a classic typosquat shape against a popular Web3 SDK. No installer-harm behavior was observed in the package's code (no exfiltration, no install-time fetch-and-execute, no silent relay, no credential distribution). Name-similarity alone is a subjective signal that benefits from human assessment of intent before a public block is issued.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
